## [00:00 - 00:59]

You know, if you sell anything on the internet, you need a copy of this new book I wrote. It's called Convert 2.0, How to Create Internet Campaigns That Sell. It's a lot simpler than you think, but there is a little bit more to it than meets the eye. Most people think you have to have an amazing web page, you have to be a great salesperson, you have to write great copy, and that used to be true until the new dawn of social media arrived. Now, there's a lot more moving parts to an internet campaign. It's complicated, but it's not. See, the good news is you don't have to be really, really great at selling anymore. Instead, you just have to be kind of good at making all these little moving parts work together. The best part is the new way of creating internet campaigns that actually sell doesn't involve being pushy at all. It actually involves you being really cool to people, helping them out and making them come to you. If you'd like to learn how to do that, click on this video and go get the book right now. I know you'll enjoy it. Thanks so much for watching. Take it easy.
